---
title: "VitalDB — Exploratory Analysis"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
# Setup — runs once, displays nothing
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import os

path = "/Users/kishantumnaransamy/R Studio/Group Assignment"

clinical  = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(path, "clinical_data.csv"))
labs      = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(path, "lab_data.csv"))
clin_dict = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(path, "clinical_parameters.csv"))

# age is text because 8 patients are top-coded ">89" for de-identification
clinical["age_num"]      = pd.to_numeric(
    clinical["age"].replace(">89", "90"), errors="coerce")
clinical["age_censored"] = clinical["age"] == ">89"

# every later chunk uses this name
df = clinical

num_vars = df.select_dtypes("number").columns
cat_vars = df.select_dtypes("object").columns

plt.rcParams.update({"figure.autolayout": True, "axes.grid": True,
                     "grid.alpha": .3, "font.size": 9})
```

# Overview

## Row {height=22%}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Operations"
dict(icon="clipboard-pulse", color="primary", value=f"{len(df):,}")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Variables"
dict(icon="table", color="secondary", value=int(df.shape[1]))
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Median age"
dict(icon="person", color="light", value=f"{df['age_num'].median():.0f} y")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "In-hospital deaths"
dict(icon="exclamation-triangle", color="danger",
     value=f"{int(df['death_inhosp'].sum())} ({100*df['death_inhosp'].mean():.1f}%)")
```

## Row {height=78%}

### Column

```{python}
#| title: "Distribution of key variables"
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 3, figsize=(11, 6))
for ax, v in zip(axes.ravel(),
                 ["age_num", "bmi", "height", "weight", "intraop_ebl", "intraop_uo"]):
    ax.hist(df[v].dropna(), bins=40, color="darkorange", edgecolor="white")
    ax.set_title(v, fontsize=10)
plt.show()
```

### Column {width=35%}

```{python}
#| title: "Numeric summary"
df[num_vars].describe().T.round(2)[["count", "mean", "std", "min", "50%", "max"]]
```

# Data quality

## Row

```{python}
#| title: "Missingness (top 30 variables)"
missing = (df.isna().mean() * 100).sort_values(ascending=False).round(1)
top = missing.head(30).iloc[::-1]
plt.figure(figsize=(7, 8))
plt.barh(top.index, top.values, color="steelblue")
plt.xlabel("% missing")
plt.show()
```

```{python}
#| title: "Categorical variables — top values"
rows = []
for v in ["sex", "department", "optype", "approach", "position",
          "ane_type", "airway"]:
    if v in df.columns:
        for k, n in df[v].value_counts(dropna=False).head(5).items():
            rows.append({"variable": v, "value": str(k), "n": int(n),
                         "%": round(100 * n / len(df), 1)})
pd.DataFrame(rows)
```

# Outcomes

## Row {height=45%}

```{python}
#| title: "Mortality by ASA physical status"
t = (df.dropna(subset=["asa"])
       .groupby("asa")["death_inhosp"].agg(n="size", deaths="sum"))
t["mortality_%"] = (100 * t["deaths"] / t["n"]).round(2)
t
```

```{python}
#| title: "Mortality — emergency vs elective"
t2 = df.groupby("emop")["death_inhosp"].agg(n="size", deaths="sum")
t2["mortality_%"] = (100 * t2["deaths"] / t2["n"]).round(2)
t2.index = ["Elective", "Emergency"]
t2
```

## Row {height=55%}

```{python}
#| title: "Age by outcome"
plt.figure(figsize=(5, 4))
plt.boxplot([df.loc[df["death_inhosp"] == 0, "age_num"].dropna(),
             df.loc[df["death_inhosp"] == 1, "age_num"].dropna()],
            tick_labels=["Survived", "Died"])
plt.ylabel("Age (years)")
plt.show()
```

```{python}
#| title: "Correlations between key variables"
cor_vars = [c for c in ["age_num", "bmi", "height", "weight", "preop_hb",
                        "preop_cr", "preop_alb", "intraop_ebl", "intraop_uo",
                        "intraop_crystalloid"] if c in df.columns]
cm = df[cor_vars].corr()
plt.figure(figsize=(6.5, 5.5))
im = plt.imshow(cm, cmap="coolwarm", vmin=-1, vmax=1)
plt.colorbar(im, label="r")
plt.xticks(range(len(cor_vars)), cor_vars, rotation=45, ha="right")
plt.yticks(range(len(cor_vars)), cor_vars)
plt.grid(False)
plt.show()
```
